marketName: Port Electrification — Shore Power, Crane, Ferry Charging
cfjStatement: Transfer cargo and passengers between vessel and landside transport networks safely, lawfully, and on schedule

l5Units.name: Shore Power / OPS Systems
l5Units.description: Cold-ironing connection for berthed ships; 50↔60 Hz frequency conversion

l4Subsystems.name: Frequency Converter
l4Subsystems.description: 50↔60 Hz static converter rated to vessel demand

l4Subsystems.name: HV Cable Management System
l4Subsystems.description: Motorised reel / crane for ship-side HV connection

l4Subsystems.name: Berth-side Connection Box
l4Subsystems.description: Plug, interlock, protection relay per IEC 80005-1

l5Units.name: Large-Scale BESS & Port Microgrid
l5Units.description: Containerised Li-ion BESS buffering peak loads, OPS demand, and renewables

l4Subsystems.name: Battery Container
l4Subsystems.description: 1–5 MWh LFP stack, BMS, HVAC, NOVEC 1230 fire suppression, IP54

l4Subsystems.name: Power Conversion System
l4Subsystems.description: 4-quadrant bidirectional inverter, grid-forming capable for microgrid mode

l4Subsystems.name: Energy Management System
l4Subsystems.description: Dispatch logic: peak shaving, OPS support, PV firming, market bidding

l4Subsystems.name: MV Transformer
l4Subsystems.description: Step-up to 10/20 kV

l4Subsystems.name: Civil Works & Fire Clearance
l4Subsystems.description: Foundation, bund, fence, Feuerwehr access per VdS

l5Units.name: Port-Side Solar PV Generation
l5Units.description: Rooftop/canopy PV on warehouses and office buildings

l4Subsystems.name: PV Modules & Mounting
l4Subsystems.description: Mono c-Si modules on warehouse roof or canopy

l4Subsystems.name: Solar Inverter
l4Subsystems.description: String or central inverter with Q(U) grid-support

l4Subsystems.name: DC Combiner & Monitoring
l4Subsystems.description: String-level metering, arc-fault detection, isolation

l4Subsystems.name: Substation Transformer
l4Subsystems.description: Oil or dry MV step-up/down transformer to DSO feeder voltage

l4Subsystems.name: MV Switchgear
l4Subsystems.description: RMU or GIS with protection, isolation, remote trip

l4Subsystems.name: Protection Relays & Metering
l4Subsystems.description: IEC 61850 protection, revenue metering, NA-protection

l5Units.name: High-Power Charging Infrastructure
l5Units.description: DC fast charging for reach stackers, terminal tractors, ferries, shore vehicles

l4Subsystems.name: DC Fast Charger
l4Subsystems.description: 150 kW–3 MW output, liquid-cooled cable, CCS2/MCS

l4Subsystems.name: Charging Management System
l4Subsystems.description: Dispenser scheduling, authentication, grid-aware dispatch

l4Subsystems.name: Vehicle Connector & Interlock
l4Subsystems.description: Plug, earth-check, insulation monitor, safety interlock

l5Units.name: Diesel Standby Generation
l5Units.description: Legacy diesel gensets for black-start and safety-critical backup

l4Subsystems.name: Diesel Engine-Generator Set
l4Subsystems.description: Prime mover with alternator

l4Subsystems.name: Fuel Tank & Bund
l4Subsystems.description: Day tank, bulk storage, spill containment

l4Subsystems.name: Auto-Transfer Switch
l4Subsystems.description: Grid-loss detection, automatic start and load transfer

vnUnits.name: Maritime Cargo & Passenger Movement Ecosystem
vnUnits.functionalJob: Economic community coordinating vessel, terminal, and landside actors to deliver the CFJ

vnUnits.name: Vessel Arrival & Berthing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Guide vessel from fairway to berth and secure alongside

vnUnits.name: Vessel–Shore Interface
vnUnits.functionalJob: Bridge vessel and quay for power, cargo, and passenger transfer

vnUnits.name: Terminal Cargo Handling
vnUnits.functionalJob: Move cargo across the quay wall between ship and yard

vnUnits.name: Yard & Storage Operations
vnUnits.functionalJob: Store, stack, and track cargo units on terminal

vnUnits.name: Landside Interchange
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hand cargo off to road, rail, or inland waterway

vnUnits.name: Passenger & Vehicle Embarkation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Embark and disembark passengers and vehicles for cruise, ferry, RoRo-pax

vnUnits.name: Port Energy & Power Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: supply, store, and dispatch electrical power to all terminal processes

vnUnits.name: Port Security & Safety
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: ISPS compliance, port police, fire, dangerous-goods

vnUnits.name: Maintenance & Civil Engineering
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: keep quay walls, pavement, cranes, and fleet operational

vnUnits.name: Terminal Operating Systems & Port IT
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: gate, TOS, port community system, single-window customs

vnUnits.name: Environmental Compliance & Emissions
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal: air, water, noise monitoring; EU ETS / FuelEU Maritime reporting
